ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., questionnaire, letter) */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit type associated with the document */,
  "date_of_document" TEXT /* Date when the document was created or issued */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date when the document was received by the DWP */,
  "latest_activity" TEXT /* Latest activity recorded for the document */,
  "added_to_claim" TEXT /* Details about whether the document has been added to a claim */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Physical path or URL of the document */,
  "signatures_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document requires signatures */,
  "signatures_received" INTEGER /* Number of signatures received */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefit_types ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_types" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit type */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., PIP, UC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for eligibility */,
  "application_process" TEXT /* Description of the application process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with this activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., reviewed, updated) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "status_change" TEXT /* Status change resulting from the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_activity_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the agency (e.g., caseworker, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit type associated with the claim */,
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claimant associated with the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the claim was created */,
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Unique number for the claim */,
  "next_action_required" TEXT /* Next action required for the claim */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the claim */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefit_types ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claimant_id FOREIGN KEY ("claimant_id") REFERENCES claimants ("claimant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claimants" (
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claimant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the claimant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the claimant */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the claimant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the claimant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the claimant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the claimant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the claimant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the claimant */,
  "income_sources" TEXT /* Income sources of the claimant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claimant_id")
)
